# Contributing to Pano_clear

Thank you for your interest in contributing to Pano_clear!

## Development Setup
1. Clone the repository
2. Run `pip install -e .[dev]`
3. Run `pre-commit install` to set up formatting and linting hooks.

## Pull Request Process
1. Create a feature branch
2. Ensure `pytest tests/` passes.
3. Submit a PR using the provided template.
